author: codex-agent

patch.value: During full-project pm normalization, dependency metadata remains incomplete because update/comments/notes/files/docs/test/learnings do not support dependency mutation. Add a first-class dependency mutation command for existing items and document deterministic usage in CLI help and AGENTS/README workflows.
Add dependency mutation command for existing items
Metadata audit found 102 items with empty dependencies and no supported CLI mutation path to add dependency links after item creation.

A supported CLI path can add and remove dependency entries on existing items with history tracking, ownership semantics, and regression tests, enabling closure of dependency metadata gaps across all items.
Dependency schema and ownership semantics are validated against current item format and history rules.
1) Run pm list-all --json and identify items with empty dependencies 2) Attempt pm update --dep ... 3) Observe unknown option and no alternative dependency mutation command
implement a dedicated dependency mutation surface for existing items
Agents can add dependency entries to existing items via a supported command and history records capture each mutation.
Dependency links can be seeded at create-time but cannot be mutated on existing items through current CLI commands.
Maintainers cannot fully normalize planning graphs, reducing traceability and automation reliability.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Issue discovered during end-to-end metadata normalization sweep when dependency fields remained the only unfillable gap.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implement command-level dependency add/remove operations with ownership and history parity.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Create-only dependency seeding is insufficient for long-lived trackers that require retrospective graph hygiene.

message: Create issue for missing dependency mutation capability discovered in global audit

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit evidence: after full metadata normalization, scalar metadata and linked notes/files/tests/docs/learnings are complete across 369 items. Remaining gap is dependencies on 102 legacy items because current CLI lacks a dependency mutation command for existing items.
